name: design
description: Design workflow plugin for workflow routing, idea capture, scoping, resonant-frequency framing, prototyping, engineering, eval, review, Jira/backlog updates, MR packages, async demos, design story presos, updates, and artifact-loop reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Route, scope, frame, prototype, engineer, eval, review, package, and present design work.
interface.longDescription: A non-linear design workflow for designers and design-adjacent partners working across ideas, prototypes, MRs, branches, shipped UI, and production codebases. It supports workflow routing, idea capture, scoping, resonant-frequency framing, coded prototypes, real-code design engineering, design-system evals, design acceptance scenarios, feedback reports, Jira/backlog ticket drafts, MR packages, async demo packages, design story presos, and team updates.
defaultPrompt: Use Design workflow to help me choose the next design move.
Use Design to scope this design problem.
Use Design to identify the resonant frequency for this design problem.
Prototype this idea as a coded product facsimile.
Evaluate this prototype against the design system.
Create an async demo package for this prototype.
Review this MR for design acceptance.
